title: Materialize savings_estimates on stability-test
root_cause: Recon mis-targeted the database. savings_estimates was already materializing in omnibase_infra (the DB the runtime savings projection and projection API use, per contract db_io.database=omnibase_infra and OMNIBASE_INFRA_DB_URL). The 0-row table observed in recon is a divergent vestigial table in omnidash_analytics that no writer targets.
fix_applied: Reconciled the vestigial omnidash_analytics.savings_estimates schema to canonical (DDL, idempotent) and reprocessed three genuine recorded delegate-skill-completed events through the running runtime consumer to demonstrate live materialization in omnibase_infra. No container rebuild/restart.

inference_backend.note: Live bifrost overlay already routes code_generation to a reachable local backend with cloud-sonnet fallback.

out_of_scope_finding: Projection API cost.summary endpoint is degraded: 'syntax error at or near "window"' (reserved-word SQL bug in cost summary aggregation). Distinct from savings_estimates; file separately.
